scripts.build: NEXT_IGNORE_INCORRECT_LOCKFILE=1 sh -c 'if [ "$MX402_RUNTIME_READY" != "1" ]; then cd ../.. && npm run build:vercel-runtime && cd apps/web; fi && PRISMA_CLIENT_DIR=../../packages/db/node_modules/.prisma/client && if [ ! -d "$PRISMA_CLIENT_DIR" ]; then PRISMA_CLIENT_DIR=../../node_modules/.prisma/client; fi && mkdir -p .prisma && rm -rf .prisma/client && cp -R "$PRISMA_CLIENT_DIR" .prisma/client && if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ]; then next build; else MX402_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build next build; fi'
scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -d .next-build ]; then MX402_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build next start; else next start; fi'
